name: 深夜照顧發燒
description: 女主深夜趕到男主家，發現他發燒卻連退燒藥都沒有，用毛巾裹冰塊降溫、跑藥店買藥、煮粥照料。昏暗燈光下的貼心照料極具感染力。
tags: 獨居男主的脆弱＋女主不顧一切趕來的深情＋密閉空間的親密氛圍

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: Ryan, you have a fever. Why don't you even have fever reducer? / I wrapped some ice in a towel. Just use this for now. / The pharmacy is only 500 m from here. It takes about 5 minutes. / 300, 299, 298... You're back.
examples.context: 獨居男主的脆弱＋女主不顧一切趕來的深情＋密閉空間的親密氛圍
